channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Non, GTA 6 ne coûtera pas 100 € : un distributeur affole la toile avec un faux prix sur son site
item.description: Ces dernières heures ont vu de nombreuses informations, vraies et fausses, leaker sur GTA 6. L'une de ces informations concerne le prix de l'édition standard du jeu qui frôlerait les 100 euros. Un "leak" qui n'a pourtant rien de crédible et sur lequel il ne faut pas s'emballer.

item.title: OpenAI just gave ChatGPT a memory for your documents — and Free users get it too
item.description: The new feature lets ChatGPT revisit documents, spreadsheets, and images you uploaded days or weeks earlier — and it could change how people organize their digital lives.

item.title: X agrees to crack down on illegal hate and terror content in the UK
item.description: British online safety regulator Ofcom says it has accepted new commitments from X that aim to better protect UK users from seeing illegal hate and terror content on the platform. Under the agreement announced today, X says it will withhold access in the UK to accounts reported posting illegal terrorist content and determined be operated […]

item.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
item.description: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.

item.title: The DJI Osmo Pocket 4P was officially teased at the Cannes Film Festival giving us clues to its headlines pro features, but we're still waiting on a launch date
item.description: We know the DJI Osmo Pocket 4P is coming, and what it looks like, but a lot of key specs are still unknown.

item.title: 'Samsung’s produced a winner here' — its fantastic Galaxy Watch 8 is now £50 off at Amazon
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 with Bluetooth and LTE support plummets in price to £319 at Amazon.

item.title: Garmin Forerunner 70 vs Garmin Forerunner 170 and 170 Music: I've compared all the specs and features of these 'easy to use' running watches
item.description: Not sure which new Garmin to buy? We break down all the differences between the Garmin Forerunner 70 and the Garmin Forerunner 170.

item.title: The UK's tax authority is turning to AI to help identify fraud
item.description: Human staff members will still check the AI's findings.

item.title: OpenAI confirms security breach in TanStack supply chain attack, but says no user data was affected
item.description: Two devices were compromised by TeamPCP's infostealing malware.

item.title: NYT Connections hints today: Clues, answers for May 15, 2026
item.description: Connections is a New York Times word game that's all about finding the "common threads between words." How to solve the puzzle.

item.title: NYT Strands hints, answers for May 15, 2026
item.description: The NYT Strands hints and answers you need to make the most of your puzzling experience.

item.title: Wordle today: Answer, hints for May 15, 2026
item.description: Here's the answer for "Wordle" #1791 on May 15 as well as a few hints, tips, and clues to help you solve it yourself.

item.title: The Musk vs Altman trial: What happens next
item.description: Closing arguments in Elon Musk's case against other OpenAI cofounders will be followed by intense deliberation by judge and jury.

item.title: Microsoft veut que Windows 11 corrige tout seul les pilotes qui plantent
item.description: À WinHEC 2026, Microsoft dévoile la Driver Quality Initiative : un programme de notation des pilotes et un mécanisme de rollback cloud automatique. L'ombre de la panne CrowdStrike de 2024 plane sur l'annonce.

item.title: Bose Lifestyle Ultra Speaker review: Versatile home audio that comes with caveats
item.description: Perhaps Bose's latest speaker is better as part of a larger system.

item.title: Vivica A. Fox on how Is God Is director compares to Quentin Tarantino
item.description: Playwright Aleshea Harris makes her directorial debut with "Is God Is." Vivica A. Fox plays God.

item.title: Le Xiaomi 17 perd 220 € : une débauche de puissance sous un écran OLED et un format compact
item.description: Le Xiaomi 17 est le dernier smartphone de la marque qui revient à 883 euros au lieu de 1 103 euros en profitant des différentes offres sur le site de Xiaomi.

item.title: Raspberry Pi founder warns replacing people with AI could ‘distort people's choices in ways that make that skill shortage worse and not better’
item.description: Raspberry Pi boss says AI technology could put young people off tech jobs and hurt the economy

item.title: The delightful Lego Icons Fountain Garden is down to under $80 at Amazon — save over $20
item.description: As of May 15, the Lego Icons Fountain Garden set is on sale at Amazon for $77.19. This is 23% off its list price of $99.99.

item.title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
item.description: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch Dutton Ranch for free
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream Dutton Ranch for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: A lawsuit seeks to stop Trump from painting the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool blue
item.description: ‘A blue-tinted basin is more appropriate to a resort or theme park,’ says the CEO of the organization suing Trump. One of the most iconic features in Washington, D.C., is facing a major change.

item.title: ‘They haven’t even made an honest effort’: OpenAI could sue Apple over its fractious Siri partnership — here’s what it might mean for you
item.description: A report claims OpenAI is considering suing Apple over the AI partnership between the two tech giants.

item.title: The Morning After: Google teases the Android-based Googlebook
item.description: And Google I/O isn't until next week.

item.title: Cyberattaques contre des services publics : la France arrête un développeur d’outils de piratage qui gagnait des millions
item.description: Les autorités françaises ont mis la main sur un rouage discret mais central de la cybercriminalité : un développeur de logiciels permettant de s'introduire dans des systèmes informatiques. Arrêté en Grèce puis extradé vers la France, cet Albanais de 39 ans a gagné des millions d'euros en quelques années. Il se défend avec des explications jugées farfelues par les magistrats....

item.title: Centris 2 Folding Ebike Review: Compact, Sturdy, Budget-Friendly
item.description: The budget-friendly Centris 2 ebike can fit the back seat of a car and has narrow handlebars for miles of easy riding—until it needs a recharge, that is.

item.title: Where to buy the Panasonic Lumix L10: here's when preorders start, the best retailers, and how to get a gold version
item.description: Can't get your hands on the Fujifilm X100VI? The new Panasonic Lumix L10 could be the premium compact camera you're looking for.

item.title: Build a Radio Wave Detector With Balls of Aluminum Foil!
item.description: Here’s how you can hack together a radio transmitter and receiver out of stuff you have at home—and explore the weirdness of wireless.

item.title: AI research papers are getting better, and it’s a big problem for scientists
item.description: Last summer, Peter Degen's postdoctoral supervisor came to him with an unusual problem: One of his papers was being cited too much. Citations are the currency of academia, but there was something unusual about these. Published in 2017, the paper had assessed the accuracy of a particular type of statistical analysis on epidemiological data and […]

item.title: Strategies you should steal from the Most Innovative Companies
item.description: The trends and strategies from this year’s Most Innovative Companies will give you actionable insights for your own workplace. In this era of AI-powered rapid change, what defines innovation at the world’s most cutting-edge companies? Fast Company’s executive editor, Amy Farley, and editorial director, Jill Bernstein, two architects of the annual Most Innovative Companies list, take you inside the ideas and approaches that earned MIC recognition for 2026. In this interactive session, they break down the trends behind this year’s most forward-thinking organizations and share practical strategi...

item.title: Volkswagen ressuscite un mythe : voici la première Polo GTI 100 % électrique !
item.description: C'est confirmé : les Volkswagen électriques deviennent des Volkswagen comme les autres. La preuve avec cette ID. Polo GTI, première voiture électrique de la marque à porter ce blason mythique. Avec 226 ch, un châssis revu et un style plus dynamique, les promesses sont bien là.
